# QB Depth Features Experiment

*Generated by `sportslab qb-depth-experiment` (v2.0.0, 2026-06-23)*

## Model Variants

| Label | Features | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| incumbent | 4 feats | Incumbent (qb_changed + rolling_mov_3) |
| career_starts | 7 feats | + team_starts_pre + qb_starts_diff |
| win_pct | 7 feats | + win_pct_pre + qb_win_pct_diff |
| missing_flag | 6 feats | + qb_missing_flag |
| qb_depth | 10 feats | + rust_games + first_season_start |
| all_depth | 18 feats | All QB depth features combined |

## Rolling-Origin Validation (3 folds: 2022, 2023, 2024)

| Model | Avg Val LL | Fold1 | Fold2 | Fold3 |
|-------|-----------|-------|-------|-------|
| incumbent | 0.6334 | 0.6413 | 0.6573 | 0.6016 |
| career_starts | 0.6462 (+0.0128) | 0.6531 | 0.7011 | 0.5845 |
| win_pct | 0.6362 (+0.0028) | 0.6444 | 0.6598 | 0.6043 |
| missing_flag | 0.6334 (+0.0000) | 0.6413 | 0.6573 | 0.6016 |
| qb_depth | 0.6512 (+0.0178) | 0.6507 | 0.7007 | 0.6021 |
| all_depth | 0.6658 (+0.0324) | 0.6502 | 0.7571 | 0.5900 |

| incumbent | 0.6262 | — |
| career_starts | 0.6327 | +0.0065 |
| win_pct | 0.6267 | +0.0005 |
